prestazioni: M113 E43 4.3L V8 engine: Replace the stock air intake with a **K&N 57-1032** high-flow conical filter paired with a **aFe Power Magnum FORCE Stage-2 Si** cold-air intake system, designed specifically for the M113’s dual-throttle body setup to eliminate restrictive factory ducting and improve throttle response by 12-15%.

Install a **VF Engineering Supercharger Kit (Part #ML430-01)** with a **Eaton M112 roots-type supercharger**, calibrated to 6-8 psi of boost via a **Vortech Max-Speed 3.3L/min fuel pump** and **Siemens DEKA 60 lb/hr injectors**, paired with a **Unichip PnP ECU (M113-specific)** to retain OEM safety nets while targeting 380-400 whp and 420 lb-ft of torque on 93 octane.

Upgrade the stock 5-speed 722.6 automatic transmission with a **Level 10 Motorsports Stage 3 Valve Body Kit**, including a **Sonnax Smart-Tech 2-3 shift kit** and **TransGo HD2 shift kit** to reduce shift lag by 40%, paired with a **PML Deep Transmission Pan** and **Mercedes-Benz AMG torque converter (Part #019 250 03 02)** for improved power handling and durability under forced induction.
estetica: Replace the factory front bumper with a **W163-specific Lorinser Type 3 body kit**, including a **carbon fiber lip spoiler** and **Lorinser side skirts (Part #W163-03-001/002)**, designed to reduce front-end lift by 18% while maintaining OEM fitment and crash safety compliance.

Install **HRE FF01 20x9.5 ET25 wheels** with a **+35mm spacer kit (Hubcentric, Part #ML430-35)** to fill the wheel arches, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 275/40/20 tires** for improved grip and aggressive stance, paired with **KW Variant 3 coilovers (W163-specific, Part #35231001)** for adjustable damping and a 30mm drop in ride height.

Add a **Rieger Tuning W163 rear diffuser (Part #RGT-W163-RD)** in matte black carbon fiber, paired with a **Remus Sport Exhaust (Part #0099 51 00 00)** featuring dual 3.5-inch stainless steel tips and a **resonator delete** for a deep, aggressive V8 tone without drone, while maintaining backpressure for low-end torque.
